MASTER CALENDAR COURT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Mar-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT CLIMB REAL ESTATE GROUP, INC., MELODY HULTGREN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
is sustained without leave to amend. See Kruse v. Bank of America (1988) 201 Cal.App.3d 354 and Gravillis v. Coldwell Banker (2006) 143 Cal.App.4th 761.The facts of this case are distinguishable from Godfrey v. Steinpress (1982) 128 Cal.App.3d 154. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Albert Loeb Boasberg, Esq., (415) 989-6960 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Richard C. Baker.
Eric Shaw, Esq., (415) 536-2800 for Defendant/Moving party Climb Real Estate Group, Inc.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANTS CLIMB REAL ESTATE GROUP, INC. and MELODY HULTGREN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is
SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for fraud, negligent misrepresentation, breach of duty to disclose for Plaintiff to allege recoverable damages and negligence. See Kruse v. Bank of America (1988) 201 Cal.App.3d 354 and Gravillis v. Coldwell Banker (2006) 143 Cal.App.4th 761. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to causes of action for breach of fiduciary duty as defendant's argument is not supported by any authorities on point and defendant fails to explain how authorities cited are relevant to these causes of action. See Points and Authorities 2:11.
Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: A. James Robertson II Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2015 Continued To Oct-15-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:
Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is Continued to October 15, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SLFR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than September 25, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
